segments.text: Normal operation is useful.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: It is also dangerous when it teaches people to treat unresolved problems as background conditions.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: No one in this story needed to wake up wanting a disaster.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: That matters because the easy version turns the accident into a morality play.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Bad people made bad choices, so better people would have stopped it.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The record is harder than that.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The system was full of people trying to do their jobs inside a decision structure that kept lowering the force of warnings.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Three pressures were running at the same time.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: First, technical uncertainty.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The shuttle was enormously complex.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Each flight produced new evidence about how hardware behaved in the real vehicle under real loads in real weather.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: That gap between design expectation and operating evidence is normal in engineering.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: What matters is how the gap gets handled.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Second, schedule pressure.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Delays did not move one item on one calendar.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: They shifted payloads, crews, customers, reviews, and promises.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The cost of stopping was visible immediately.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Third, institutional reputation.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: NASA was not only an engineering organization.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: It was a national symbol, a funding case, a Cold War instrument, and a public trust.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: These pressures met inside the same rooms.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: When they conflicted, the most flexible thing was often uncertainty.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: A technical concern could be reframed.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: It could be qualified.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: It could be moved to the next review.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Schedule and reputation were harder to bend.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: So the practical standard drifted.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The question became, keep flying unless the evidence against flying is overwhelming.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: That is very different from, do not fly unless the evidence for safety is clear.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The difference showed up most clearly in one component.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The shuttle used two solid rocket boosters for most of its thrust during the first two minutes of flight.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Each booster was not built as one continuous piece.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: It was assembled from cylindrical segments, stacked and joined at the launch site.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: where the segments met, there was a field joint.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Inside that joint, two rubber o-rings, a primary and a secondary, were supposed to seal the gap and keep hot combustion gases inside the booster.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The joint had to seal quickly.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: Pressure inside the motor could distort the metal parts at ignition.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00

segments.text: The o-rings had to move into position fast enough to block hot gas before it escaped.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
